_meta.title: Sports Supplements E-Commerce Product Taxonomy
_meta.notes: Production-ready taxonomy for a sports supplements e-commerce store. All data verified against live retailer catalogs as of March 2026.

1_protein.name: Protein
1_protein.description: Protein powders, bars, and ready-to-drink supplements for muscle building and recovery.

2_pre_workout.name: Pre-Workout
2_pre_workout.description: Formulas for energy, focus, pump, and performance before training.

3_creatine.name: Creatine
3_creatine.description: Creatine supplements for strength, power output, and muscle volumization.

4_amino_acids.name: Amino Acids
4_amino_acids.description: BCAAs, EAAs, and individual amino acid supplements for recovery and performance.

5_fat_loss.name: Fat Burners & Weight Management
5_fat_loss.description: Thermogenics, metabolism boosters, appetite suppressants, and weight management support.

6_performance_endurance.name: Performance & Endurance
6_performance_endurance.description: Intra-workout, endurance, nitric oxide, and performance-enhancing supplements.

7_recovery.name: Recovery & Post-Workout
7_recovery.description: Supplements designed to accelerate recovery, reduce soreness, and support repair.

8_testosterone_hormone.name: Testosterone & Hormone Support
8_testosterone_hormone.description: Natural testosterone boosters, hormone optimization, and male performance supplements.

9_vitamins_health.name: Vitamins & General Health
9_vitamins_health.description: Multivitamins, minerals, and general wellness supplements for active individuals.

10_functional_foods.name: Functional Foods & Drinks
10_functional_foods.description: Healthy snacks, nut butters, sugar-free options, and performance-oriented food items.

11_stacks_bundles.name: Supplement Stacks & Bundles
11_stacks_bundles.description: Pre-built supplement combinations designed for specific goals.

12_accessories.name: Accessories & Gear
12_accessories.description: Shaker bottles, gym bags, lifting accessories, and apparel.

variantAttributes.flavors: Subset of flavorLibrary (primarily Chocolate, Vanilla, Peanut Butter, Berry, Unflavored)
Typically: Chocolate, Vanilla, Cookies & Cream, Strawberry
Typically: Chocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry, Banana, Cookies & Cream
Wide range: Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough, Cookies & Cream, Birthday Cake, Peanut Butter, S'mores, etc.
See flavorLibrary - especially fruit, candy, and ice flavors
Mostly Unflavored; flavored options: Fruit Punch, Blue Raspberry, Lemon Lime
See flavorLibrary - especially fruit and candy flavors

commonBrands: GNC Mega Men / Women's Ultra Mega

variantAttributes.flavors: Typically: Original Green, Berry, Lemon, Mint, Unflavored
Fruit flavors: Lemon Lime, Orange, Watermelon, Grape, Mixed Berry

dietaryRestrictions.description: No meat-derived ingredients; may contain dairy/eggs
Does not contain gluten or wheat-based ingredients
Contains no milk or dairy derivatives
Contains no soy or soy lecithin
Contains no tree nuts or peanuts
Suitable for those with lactose intolerance

certifications.description: Not derived from genetically modified organisms
Tested and certified free of banned substances by NSF International
Tested by LGC for banned substances under WADA prohibited list
Batch-tested for banned substances by LGC
Verified by U.S. Pharmacopeia for purity, potency, and quality
Current Good Manufacturing Practices compliant facility
Certified by Banned Substances Control Group

nutritionalTags.description: Sweetened only with natural sweeteners (stevia, monk fruit)
Uses stevia, monk fruit, or other natural sweeteners

lifestyleTags.description: Low carb, high fat compatible with ketogenic diet
From cows not treated with growth hormones
Processed at low temperatures to preserve nutrients

primaryGoals.name: Muscle Building
primaryGoals.description: Supplements to support muscle growth, strength, and mass gains.

primaryGoals.name: Weight Loss / Fat Burning
primaryGoals.description: Supplements to support fat loss, metabolism, and body composition.

primaryGoals.name: Recovery & Repair
primaryGoals.description: Supplements to accelerate recovery, reduce soreness, and support sleep.

primaryGoals.name: Endurance & Stamina
primaryGoals.description: For runners, cyclists, triathletes, and endurance athletes.

primaryGoals.name: General Health & Wellness
primaryGoals.description: Foundational supplements for overall health and daily nutrition.

primaryGoals.name: Strength & Power
primaryGoals.description: For powerlifters, strongmen, and maximal strength athletes.

primaryGoals.name: Lean Muscle / Body Recomposition
primaryGoals.description: For building lean muscle while minimizing fat gain.

experienceLevel.name: Beginner Essentials
experienceLevel.description: The fundamental supplements for those just starting their fitness journey.

experienceLevel.name: Intermediate Stack
experienceLevel.description: Additional supplements for training progression after 6-12 months.

experienceLevel.name: Advanced / Competition Prep
experienceLevel.description: Comprehensive supplement regimen for serious athletes and competitors.

tier1_major.name: Optimum Nutrition (ON)
tier1_major.notes: Industry standard; #1 selling whey protein globally. Owned by Glanbia.

tier1_major.name: MuscleTech
tier1_major.notes: Research-driven brand. Strong in Walmart/mass retail distribution.

tier1_major.name: BSN
tier1_major.notes: Known for taste-focused protein blends. Owned by Glanbia.

tier1_major.name: Dymatize
tier1_major.notes: Premium isolate brand. Owned by BellRing Brands.

tier1_major.name: Cellucor / Xtend
tier1_major.notes: #1 selling pre-workout brand (C4). Nutrabolt parent company.

tier1_major.name: MyProtein
tier1_major.notes: Largest online sports nutrition brand in Europe. Owned by THG.

tier1_major.name: Ghost
tier1_major.notes: Lifestyle brand known for cereal/candy brand collaborations (Lucky Charms, Oreo, Chips Ahoy). Rapidly growing.

tier1_major.name: Redcon1
tier1_major.notes: Military-themed brand. Strong social media presence.

tier1_major.name: Transparent Labs
tier1_major.notes: Known for fully transparent labels, no proprietary blends. Clinically dosed.

tier1_major.name: Kaged
tier1_major.notes: Founded by Kris Gethin. Informed Sport certified, clinically dosed.

tier2_popular.name: Gorilla Mind
tier2_popular.notes: Founded by Derek (More Plates More Dates). Huge doses per serving.

tier2_popular.name: Ryse
tier2_popular.notes: Licensed flavors (Ring Pop, Skippy PB, Kool-Aid). Lifestyle brand.

tier2_popular.name: EHP Labs
tier2_popular.notes: #1 selling fat burner brand. Also popular in energy drink space.

tier2_popular.name: Raw Nutrition
tier2_popular.notes: Founded by Chris Bumstead (Classic Physique Mr. Olympia). CBUM line.

tier2_popular.name: Rule 1 (R1)
tier2_popular.notes: Founded by former ON executives. Focus on clean, high-quality formulas.

tier2_popular.name: Nutrex Research
tier2_popular.notes: Strong budget option. Known for Lipo-6 fat burner line.

tier2_popular.name: AllMax Nutrition
tier2_popular.notes: Canadian brand with strong quality reputation.

tier2_popular.name: Mutant
tier2_popular.notes: Known for mass gainers. Hardcore gym branding.

tier2_popular.name: ProSupps
tier2_popular.notes: Known for Mr. Hyde high-stim pre-workout.

tier3_specialty_and_budget.name: California Gold Nutrition (iHerb)
tier3_specialty_and_budget.focus: Whey Isolate, Plant Protein at great value

israeliMiddleEasternBrands.name: BioTechUSA
israeliMiddleEasternBrands.notes: Very popular in Israel and across the Middle East. Wide distribution.

israeliMiddleEasternBrands.name: Scitec Nutrition
israeliMiddleEasternBrands.notes: Strong presence in Israeli supplement stores.

israeliMiddleEasternBrands.name: Olimp Sport Nutrition
israeliMiddleEasternBrands.notes: European brand with Middle East distribution.

israeliMiddleEasternBrands.name: Life (Life Supplements / Life Pro)
israeliMiddleEasternBrands.notes: Israeli domestic brand available in local supplement shops.

israeliMiddleEasternBrands.name: Amino Z
israeliMiddleEasternBrands.notes: Online supplement retailer with own-brand products.

israeliMiddleEasternBrands.name: Iron Supplements (Iron Supp)
israeliMiddleEasternBrands.notes: Israeli brand sold in local gym stores and online.

israeliMiddleEasternBrands.name: Super Effect
israeliMiddleEasternBrands.notes: Popular Israeli brand with competitive pricing.

seasonal.name: Summer Shred Collection
seasonal.description: Get lean for summer. Focus on fat burning, lean protein, and definition.

seasonal.name: New Year Resolution Bundle
seasonal.description: Starter packs for new gym-goers. Simple, approachable products.

seasonal.name: Fall Bulk Season
seasonal.description: Mass gaining season. Heavy on calories, protein, and strength supplements.

seasonal.name: Competition Prep Package
seasonal.description: Advanced stack for bodybuilding, physique, and figure competitors.

seasonal.name: Back to School / Fall Fitness
seasonal.description: Value-oriented packs for students and young athletes.

seasonal.name: Holiday Gift Sets
seasonal.description: Gift-ready supplement bundles and sampler packs.

trendingCategories2026.name: Creatine for Everyone
trendingCategories2026.description: Creatine has gone mainstream beyond bodybuilders - women, older adults, and general health consumers. New formats: gummies, chews, liquid, pre-mixed.

trendingCategories2026.name: Collab / Licensed Flavors
trendingCategories2026.description: Brand collabs (Ghost x Lucky Charms, Ryse x Ring Pop, etc.) driving discovery and social media virality.

trendingCategories2026.name: Greens & Gut Health
trendingCategories2026.description: Greens powders, prebiotics, probiotics, and digestive health supplements surging in popularity.

trendingCategories2026.name: Turkesterone & Natural Anabolics
trendingCategories2026.description: Ecdysteroids and plant-based anabolic alternatives trending among natty lifters.

trendingCategories2026.name: Ready-to-Drink & Convenience Formats
trendingCategories2026.description: RTD protein shakes, canned energy drinks with aminos, and single-serve packets growing rapidly.

trendingCategories2026.name: Women's Sports Nutrition
trendingCategories2026.description: Dedicated women's lines - lower calorie protein, iron-fortified, collagen-enriched, hormone-supportive formulas.

trendingCategories2026.name: Clean Label / Transparency
trendingCategories2026.description: Consumers demanding fully disclosed labels, no proprietary blends, third-party testing (NSF/Informed Sport).

trendingCategories2026.name: Creatine Gummies & Chews
trendingCategories2026.description: New form factor making creatine more palatable and convenient. GNC and others launching dedicated lines.

trendingCategories2026.name: Nootropics & Cognitive Performance
trendingCategories2026.description: Alpha-GPC, Lion's Mane, L-Theanine combinations for focus during training.

trendingCategories2026.name: Hydration & Electrolyte Market Explosion
trendingCategories2026.description: LMNT, Liquid IV, and sports-specific electrolyte brands growing 50%+ year over year.
